videos.title: Ski Archery 2002 - TOP15_SLO.avi
videos.description:
TOP15 was race with best 15 racers on Ski Archery World Cup. First TOP15 race on season 2001/2002 was on Pokljuka.
See best archers on skis like PERACINO, MARKOV, ZUPAN, GARDONI, MENCHIKOV, MASLENIKOV, LOEWERT, ...

videos.title: Svendsen Disappointed With 4th in Pokljuka
videos.description: Fourth in mass start not good enough for Olympic Champion
